strap: West Yorkshire Advanced Manufacturing draws £575m of UKRI lead-led funding across 740 grants, anchored by Leeds (39%), Huddersfield (6%), with Cummins Turbo Technologies on the industrial side.
behaviour: The cluster shows high-confidence "Forgiving instead of redesigning" and "Re-proving instead of narrowing" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
